inputs.label: Top Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the depression at the top surface

inputs.label: Top Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the depression at the top surface

inputs.label: Bottom Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the depression at the bottom

inputs.label: Bottom Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the depression at the bottom

inputs.label: Depth
inputs.businessContext: Depth of the depression from top to bottom

formulas.depressionVolume: (depth / 3) * (topLength * topWidth + bottomLength * bottomWidth + Math.sqrt(topLength * topWidth * bottomLength * bottomWidth))
